source_domain_family: Wiener-Hopf operator theory / Hardy-space half-line factorization
framing_text: Wiener-Hopf factorization splits an integral kernel on a half-line into a causal and anticausal pair via multiplicative factorization of its symbol on the imaginary axis. This decomposition is classical in scattering theory and queueing; it has not been operationalized for transformer attention.
